prompt: Write a short summary of the benefits of using a local LLM.
completion: Running a local LLM gives you privacy, faster iteration, and direct control over the model and its data. It can be customized for your own workflows and kept offline when needed.

prompt: Explain why LoRA is a useful fine-tuning technique.
completion: LoRA trains only a small adapter instead of the entire model, which makes fine-tuning much cheaper in memory and compute. It allows you to personalize style without modifying the full base model.
